info.title: Material Library API
info.description:
## Material Library Backend API

A comprehensive API for managing materials, projects, products, components, and inventories 
with environmental impact tracking (Global Warming Potential - GWP).

### Features
- **Material Database**: Create and manage materials with metadata and GWP values
- **Project Management**: Organize projects with products and components
- **Inventory Management**: Track material inventories with geolocation
- **Material Transfer**: Transfer or gift materials between users
- **User Relationships**: Connect with other users for material sharing

### Authentication
All endpoints except registration and login require a valid JWT token.
Include the token in the Authorization header: `Bearer <token>`

post.description: Create a new user account with email and password
Authenticate user and return JWT token

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user profile

put.description: Update the currently authenticated user profile

get.description: Retrieve all materials with optional filtering

parameters.name: my_materials
parameters.description: Only show materials created by current user

post.description: Create a new material with metadata and GWP values

get.description: Get list of predefined material categories
Retrieve a specific material by its ID
Retrieve all public projects from other users (marketplace)
Retrieve all projects owned by the current user
Retrieve a project with its products, images, and materials

200.description: Project details with products and images

delete.description: Delete a project and its associated images (owner only)

post.description: Upload one or more images to a project (max 10 files)

get.description: Retrieve all images for a project

delete.description: Delete an image from a project (owner only)

post.description: Associate a material with a project

delete.description: Remove a material association from a project

get.description: Retrieve all inventory entries for the current user

post.description: Add a material to user inventory with quantity and location

get.summary: Get available inventory from other users
get.description: Retrieve inventory available for transfer or gift from other users

parameters.name: transfer_only
parameters.description: Only show items available for transfer

parameters.name: gift_only
parameters.description: Only show items available as gifts

200.description: List of available inventory from other users

get.description: Retrieve all material transfers (incoming and outgoing)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by transfer direction (incoming, outgoing, all)

put.description: Update an existing inventory entry (owner only)

post.description: Create a material transfer request to another user

400.description: Insufficient inventory or not available for transfer

404.description: Inventory or target user not found

post.description: Create a material gift to another user

400.description: Insufficient inventory or not available for gifting

404.description: Inventory or target user not found

get.description: Retrieve all relationships for the current user

post.description: Send a relationship request to another user by email

400.description: Relationship already exists or invalid request

get.description: Retrieve pending relationship requests (where user is receiver)
Retrieve accepted relationships (contacts for material sharing)
Search for a user by email to create a relationship

delete.description: Delete a relationship (either party can delete)
